statements: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 REAL UNIQUE, c1 REAL NOT NULL, c2 TEXT COLLATE RTRIM, c3 TEXT);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i00 ON t0(c3, c1, c0);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i11 ON t0(c2);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i22 ON t0(c2, c0);
INSERT INTO t0 (c0, c1, c2, c3) VALUES (-39.3, 268.95, 'pGOujRfu', 'R');
INSERT INTO t0 (c0, c1, c2, c3) VALUES (NULL, 914.17, 'KHYs', '3ikVRFn'), (739.2, 407.42, '9CydhXxZ', 'IMmRHbqJt8');
UPDATE t0 SET c1 = -692.67, c0 = -933.57 WHERE c2 < 18;
SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c1 ASC;
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM t0 WHERE c2 IS NULL OR c1 != -32 GROUP BY c1, c0 LIMIT 53 OFFSET 12;
SELECT c0 FROM t0 WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL AND c3 BETWEEN -66 AND 98 AND c0 IS NOT NULL;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t0;
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 REAL UNIQUE, c1 REAL NOT NULL, c2 TEXT COLLATE RTRIM, c3 TEXT);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i00 ON t0(c3, c1, c0);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i11 ON t0(c2);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i22 ON t0(c2, c0);
INSERT INTO t0 (c0, c1, c2, c3) VALUES (-39.3, 268.95, 'pGOujRfu', 'R');
INSERT INTO t0 (c0, c1, c2, c3) VALUES (NULL, 914.17, 'KHYs', '3ikVRFn'), (739.2, 407.42, '9CydhXxZ', 'IMmRHbqJt8');
UPDATE t0 SET c1 = -692.67, c0 = -933.57 WHERE c2 < 18;
UPDATE t0 SET c3 = '1n2Bu', c1 = 824.22;
SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c1 ASC;
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM t0 WHERE c2 IS NULL OR c1 != -32 GROUP BY c1, c0 LIMIT 53 OFFSET 12;
SELECT c0 FROM t0 WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL AND c3 BETWEEN -66 AND 98 AND c0 IS NOT NULL;
